# DCT Copilot Skills

This folder contains skills installed by the **DCT Copilot Skills** VS Code extension.

## What are Skills?

Skills are instruction sets that customize how DCT Copilot behaves for specific tasks. Each skill lives in its own subfolder and contains prompt files that guide the AI for that particular workflow.

## Folder Structure

```
.github/
  skills/
    skill-name/
      instructions/
        system.md   # System-level instructions for the AI
        user.md     # User-facing guidance and usage examples
```

## Installed Skills

Skills installed via the dashboard will appear as subfolders here. You can:
- Edit skill instructions to customize behavior for your project
- Add new skills manually following the folder structure above
- Remove skills by deleting their folder

## Managing Skills

Open the **DCT Copilot Skills** panel in the VS Code Activity Bar to browse and install available skills.
